title: MovableInventory
description: A simple mod to see what you have in your inventory at all times!
body:
# 🧩 Movable Inventory

**Movable Inventory** allows you to show the content of your inventory anywhere on your screen! 

**This mod requires [Movable Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/movablehud) to work!**

## ✨ Features
- 🖱️ **Drag & Drop:** Move HUD elements anywhere on your screen  
- 🔍 **Right-Click Resize:** Smoothly scale elements to your liking 
- 👻 **Scroll:** Easily change the transparency of the element 
- 💾 **Auto Save:** Layouts are stored in `config/movableHud.json`  
- 🔄 **Auto Load:** Restores your setup automatically on startup 

## 🧠 How To Use
1. **`/movablehud`** → Open the movable Hud screen
2. **Left-click + drag** → Move an element  
3. **Right-click + drag** → Resize it  
4. **Scroll** → Change the transparency on an object
5. **Close the screen** → Changes save automatically  

**Next time you launch Minecraft, your custom HUD layout is instantly restored.**
